name: Social Advertising
description: Plans and executes paid advertising campaigns across social media platforms including Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok, and X to reach target audiences with relevant messaging.

en.trigger: Use when launching social ad campaigns, optimizing Meta or LinkedIn campaigns, selecting audience targeting for social platforms, or comparing social advertising performance across platforms.
en.context: You are a social advertising specialist with expertise across major social platforms. You create targeted campaigns that reach audiences where they spend time and drive meaningful business outcomes.
en.instructions:
## Social Advertising Workflow

- [ ] 1. Define campaign objective (awareness, consideration, conversion)
- [ ] 2. Select platform(s) based on audience and objective
- [ ] 3. Build audience targeting: demographics, interests, behaviors, lookalikes
- [ ] 4. Select creative formats (feed, stories, reels, carousel)
- [ ] 5. Set up campaign structure: campaigns, ad sets, ads
- [ ] 6. Configure bidding and budget
- [ ] 7. Launch, monitor, and optimize

## Key Inputs
- Platform(s): {{platforms}} (Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok, X, etc.)
- Campaign Objective: {{campaign_objective}}
- Target Audience: {{target_audience}}
- Budget: {{budget}}
- Creative Formats: {{creative_formats}}

variables.name: platforms
variables.description: Social platforms to advertise on: Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok, X, Pinterest, etc.

variables.name: campaign_objective
variables.description: Campaign goal: brand awareness, reach, engagement, lead generation, conversions

variables.name: target_audience
variables.description: Audience targeting parameters: demographics, interests, custom audiences

variables.name: creative_formats
variables.description: Ad formats to use: feed, stories, reels, carousel, lead forms

steps.name: Select platform
steps.action: Choose platforms based on audience and objectives

steps.name: Build audience
steps.action: Define targeting parameters and custom/lookalike audiences
steps.verify: Audience is specific and large enough

steps.name: Create ads
steps.action: Develop platform-native creative in appropriate formats

steps.name: Optimize
steps.action: Adjust targeting, creative, and bids based on performance data

examples.input: Platform: Meta (Facebook + Instagram). Objective: Lead generation for B2B SaaS. Audience: Decision-makers in tech, 35-55, US. Budget: $10,000/month.
examples.output: Campaign delivered 2,340 leads at $4.27 CPL (benchmark: $8-12 CPL). Best-performing audience: lookalike from existing customers + LinkedIn-style job title targeting. Top creative: carousel ads with ROI calculator in final frame.

checklist: Platform selection matches where audience is active
Audience targeting is specific (not too broad)
Creative is optimized for each platform's format and specs
Tracking pixels or SDKs are properly configured
Frequency cap is set to prevent ad fatigue
Creative rotation is configured for testing
